meta.title: Migrating to GitHub Actions
meta.intro: Learn how to migrate your existing CI/CD workflows to GitHub Actions.

body:
# Migrating to GitHub Actions

Learn how to migrate your existing CI/CD workflows to GitHub Actions.

## Links

* [Using GitHub Actions Importer to automate migrations](/en/actions/tutorials/migrate-to-github-actions/automated-migrations)

  Learn how to use GitHub Actions Importer to migrate your CI/CD workflows to GitHub Actions.

* [Manually migrating to GitHub Actions](/en/actions/tutorials/migrate-to-github-actions/manual-migrations)

  Learn how to manually migrate your existing CI/CD workflows to GitHub Actions.
